The pages in this section are generated from 80 public Markdown files in the repo. The site also mirrors 53 documentation artifacts such as schemas, mission examples, helper source files, casts, and deployment manifests. Generated site content, local review context, and dependency/vendor directories are excluded from publication. The CI check fails when generated documentation drifts from its source hash.
